svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="串行 vs 并行 subagent" id="parallel"> <mxGraphModel dx="-549" dy="-147" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="同一个问题,串行问 AI 和并行扇出去的本质区别" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="700" x="200" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ser_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="串行问 AI(把 AI 当搜索引擎)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" x="80" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ser_user" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="人" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="60" x="220" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ser_ai1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="AI 回答 1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="200" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ser_ai2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="AI 回答 2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="200" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ser_ai3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="AI 回答 3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="200" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ser_out" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="单条结论" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="100" x="200" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ser_user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="ser_ai1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ser_ai1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="ser_ai2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ser_ai2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="ser_ai3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se4" edge="1" parent="1" source="ser_ai3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="ser_out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ser_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="特征:
• 单线来回,认知窄
• 后一次只在前一次的影子里
• 容易被第一回答带偏
• 慢" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="340" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="par_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#0f766e;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="并行扇出去(把 AI 当一支团队)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" x="620" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="par_user" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="人" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="60" x="760" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="par_a1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d1fae5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="agent A
视角:架构" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="620" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="par_a2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d1fae5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="agent B
视角:性能" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="740" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="par_a3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d1fae5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="agent C
视角:边界 / 异常" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="110" x="860" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="par_merge" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="汇总 / 取舍" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="750" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="par_out" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="多维结论
(更稳)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="750" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe1" edge="1" parent="1" source="par_user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="par_a1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="670" y="170" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe2" edge="1" parent="1" source="par_user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="par_a2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="790" y="170" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe3" edge="1" parent="1" source="par_user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="par_a3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="915" y="170" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe4" edge="1" parent="1" source="par_a1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="par_merge"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe5" edge="1" parent="1" source="par_a2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="par_merge"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe6" edge="1" parent="1" source="par_a3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="par_merge"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe7" edge="1" parent="1" source="par_merge" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="par_out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="par_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="特征:
• 多视角同时探索
• 互不知道,各自独立
• 汇总时人做取舍
• 快,且结论更鲁棒" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="620" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
特征:
• 单线来回,认知窄
• 后一次只在前一次的影子里
• 容易被第一回答带偏
• 慢
